title: Wexford Carol
description: A traditional Irish Christmas carol arranged in a melody-first letter-note and fingering-chart layout for recorder, ocarina, and tin whistle practice.
lyrics: Good peo ple _ all this Christ mas time, Con
sid er _ well and _ bear in mind, What our good God for
us has done, in send ing His _ be lov ed Son. With
Mar y ho _ ly we _ should pray to _
God _ with love _ this _ Christ mas Day In Beth le _ hem up
on that morn, There was a bless _ ed Mes si _ ah born.
